      prev_dp = current_dp

end

def solve(nums, k)
  total_sum = nums.sum
  n = nums.length
  if n == 0
    return 0
  end
  prefix_sum = 0
  prev_dp = 0
  mod_map = {0 => 0}
  (1..n).each do |i|
    prefix_sum += nums[i-1]
    m = prefix_sum % k
    max_val = mod_map[m] || -Float::INFINITY
    current_candidate = prefix_sum + max_val
    current_dp = [prev_dp, current_candidate].max
    new_val = current_dp - prefix_sum
    if mod_map[m].nil? || new_val > mod_map[m]
      mod_map[m] = new_val
    end
    prev_dp = current_dp
  end
  total_sum - prev_dp
end

def solve(nums, k)

   total_sum = nums.sum

   n = nums.length

   if n == 0

      return 0

   end

   prefix_sum = 0

   prev_dp = 0

   mod_map = {0 => 0}

   for i in 1..n do

      prefix_sum += nums[i-1]

      m = prefix_sum % k

      # get the max_val for m

      max_val = mod_map[m] || -Float::INFINITY

      current_candidate = prefix_sum + max_val

      current_dp = [prev_dp, current_candidate].max

      new_val = current_dp - prefix_sum

      # update mod_map for m

      if mod_map[m].nil? || new_val > mod_map[m]

         mod_map[m] = new_val

      end

      prev_dp = current_dp

   end

   max_deleted = prev_dp

   return total_sum - max_deleted

end
